xPosts.content: HuggingFace CEO Clem Delangue said we're in an “LLM bubble“ that might burst next year, arguing the industry's obsessed with building one massive model when...
xPosts.highlights: Delangue warns that the current AI hype is specifically an LLM bubble, not a broader AI bubble, and it may burst soon.
xPosts.worthReading: Provides a critical perspective on the sustainability of LLM-focused investments.

xPosts.content: Clem Delangue, CEO of Hugging Face, is making open-source AI practical, scalable, and ethical. See why he's one of BigDATAwire's 2026 People
xPosts.highlights: Delangue is recognized for advancing open-source AI with a focus on practicality, scalability, and ethics.
xPosts.worthReading: Highlights Delangue's leadership in making open-source AI a viable and ethical alternative.

xPosts.content: We're launching the agentic robotics app store today. Let's democratize AI robotics for all! 300+ apps shipped. 10,000 robots in the wild. It used to take weeks from a robotics engineer to build apps, now everyone can do it in hours with ML intern or your favorite neighborhood
xPosts.highlights: Hugging Face launches an app store for agentic robotics, enabling rapid app development by non-experts.
xPosts.worthReading: Highlights a major push to democratize robotics through AI, making it accessible beyond specialists.

xPosts.content: Local open-weight AI on a laptop has been improving more than twice as fast as Moore's Law! Between May 2024 and May 2026, the most expensive MacBook Pro you could buy stayed at 128 GB of unified memory. The hardware ceiling barely moved. But the smartest open-weight model
xPosts.highlights: Open-weight AI models on laptops are improving at over twice the rate of Moore's Law, outpacing hardware constraints.
xPosts.worthReading: Shows the rapid progress of local AI, suggesting a shift toward edge inference and reduced reliance on cloud.
